di-processor/pom.xml.general_idea: Add Jakarta Annotation API dependency to replace or supplement Java EE annotations for Java 17 compatibility.
Add Jakarta Inject API dependency to replace or supplement Java EE injection annotations for Java 17 compatibility.

di-processor/src/main/java/com/github/th.general_idea: Refactor instanceof check to use pattern matching for cleaner code.

if (element instanceof ExecutableElement) {

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace deprecated source/target configuration with the unified release flag for Java 17.
pom.xml.why_exists: The 'source' and 'target' options are deprecated in newer compiler plugin versions and do not configure the bootstrap classpath for language features like records or sealed classes, leading to compilation errors for Java 17+ syntax.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade maven-compiler-plugin to a version compatible with Java 17 compilation.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older versions of the maven-compiler-plugin may fail to compile code targeting Java 17 or may not support the 'release' flag correctly.

test/pom.xml.general_idea: Add Jakarta Inject API dependency to replace or supplement Java EE annotations.
Update maven-compiler-plugin configuration to use the 'release' flag for Java 17 instead of separate source/target flags for Java 8.
test/pom.xml.why_exists: The 'source' and 'target' flags are deprecated in favor of 'release' for modern JDKs, and setting source/target to 1.8 prevents compilation of Java 17 language features.

test/pom.xml.general_idea: Bump maven-compiler-plugin version to a newer snapshot compatible with Java 17.
